---
title: "foer_besoegsdag_2"
subtitle: "`foer_besoegsdag_2`"
description: "foer_besoegsdag_2"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/foer_besoegsdag_2/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                    | Title                        | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                                             |
|-------------------------|------------------------------|--------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                 | The unique name of the event | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                                      |
| `center`                | Research center              | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                                   |
| `book_bloodsample_wfv2` | book_bloodsample_wfv2        | string | Blood sample booking prior to visit. Workflow. Visit 2.                                                                                                                 |
| `cgm_reader_wfv2`       | cgm_reader_wfv2              | string | Reader to be prepared for the visit. The same reader used to initialise the sensor at Visit 1. Wfv2. Derived using the formula: [besg_1__screening_arm_1][cgmreader_v1] |
| `cgm_reader_ready_wfv2` | cgm_reader_ready_wfv2        | string | CGM reader ready. Workflow. Visit 2.                                                                                                                                    |

: Fields in the `foer_besoegsdag_2` resource.
